title: Homer's Head As A Seal.
content:
Trusty old Homer! to thee I confide the secret so tender;
    For the raptures of love none but the bard should e'er know.
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Homer's Head As A Seal."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
